# Architecture Briefs

Architecture Briefs produced by harness stage 1 (Architect, `.github/instructions/03-ARCHITECT.md`)
are persisted here so a later session inherits the gate decisions instead of re-deriving them.

One Brief per file, `kebab-case` topic name. A Brief's first line is its title; the second line
should carry a status marker — `active`, `implemented`, or `superseded` — so the dashboard and
future sessions can tell which decisions still hold.

Briefs may also carry the optional OKF-compatible frontmatter described in the
[memory README](../README.md#okf-compatible-frontmatter-optional) (`type: brief`, plus `status`,
`summary`, dates). When present, the `status` field is the machine-readable equivalent of the
second-line marker.

This kit ships the protocol only — no Briefs. Yours accumulate here as features are designed.
